place: Bang Rak Beach, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Anava Samui — Beachfront Condominium, Bang Rak
blurb: Anava Samui is a brand-new beachfront condominium on Bang Rak Bay, Koh Samui — one of the island's first EIA-approved condos, where a foreigner can own freehold in their own name — legally and forever — within the building's 49% foreign-ownership quota (leasehold also available). A hotel-style community of 564 studio-to-three-bedroom residences wrapped around resort pools and landscaped gardens, with a gym, sky bar, restaurant, concierge and direct beach access. A strong rental play with a projected 8–15% yield. From ฿2,990,000.
detail:
Anava Samui is a brand-new beachfront condominium set directly on Bang Rak Bay, on the sought-after north-east coast of Koh Samui. It holds a rare distinction as one of the island's first EIA-approved condominiums, which lets a foreigner hold freehold title in their own name under the Thai Condominium Act — legally, outright and in perpetuity — subject to the building's 49% foreign-ownership quota, the standard route for a foreigner to own Thai real estate directly. Leasehold structuring is available as an alternative.

Conceived around a "garden by the pool" concept and inspired by five-star resort design, the development spans 564 residences in low-rise blocks threaded with swimming pools, water features and tropical landscaping. Homes range from studios to three-bedroom layouts, most with 2.71-metre ceilings and sea, pool or garden outlooks. Hotel-style amenities include a residents' gym, sky bar, restaurant, lobby and concierge, with direct access to the beach at the foot of the site.

The setting is one of Samui's most convenient: Bang Rak (Big Buddha) Beach, minutes from Fisherman's Village and Choeng Mon, close to international schools, hospitals and shopping, and under fifteen minutes from Samui International Airport. With a professional rental-management program in place, the developer projects a rental yield of roughly 8–15%, making it as compelling for investors as for owner-occupiers. Offered freehold or leasehold, with completion phased through 2027.

Starting prices by type (leasehold / freehold):
Studio · from ฿2,990,000 / ฿3,600,000
1-bedroom · from ฿4,566,224 / ฿5,077,956
2-bedroom · from ฿9,242,100 / ฿10,269,000
3-bedroom · price on request

Prices reflect the current price list (special release, updated April 2026); availability, sizes and unit mix vary by block and release.

Payment scheme& others fee
• Booking fee: 50K( During reservation contract signed)
• Upon SPA signed: 30%-50K (Within 7~15 days from reservation agreement signed)
• Structure done: 40% 
• ID Job start: 20%
• Ownership transfer: 10% (Estimate 15-04-2027)
• Transfer fee to government:1% (Estimate 15-06-2027)
• Maintenance fee: 80THB/PSM/Month
• Sinking fund: 800THB/PSM/1 time(until sinking fund used
